channel.title: Marriage on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Marriage on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: Say Yes to Your Spouse
item.description:
I could probably stand to work on this, but “Your goal should be to say “Yes” as often as you can”

Or, from what I understand about improve it’s always, “yes, and”.

Keys to Your “Happily Ever After” Marriage: Say Yes to Your SpousePlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.

item.title: How to Make a Marriage Work
item.description:
Always good to have a reminder to put that key relationship first…

Read the full article herePlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

item.title: These 10 Simple Things You Do Are Making Your Marriage Last, Even Though You’re Not Aware Of It
item.description:
A happy, healthy, and lasting marriage is the goal of every couple. We have all heard that half of all marriages end in divorce, and nobody wants their marriage to be another statistic.

The list is below, but you can Read the full article here

  1. Kiss
  2. Express Gratitude
  3. Touch Each Other
  4. Talk
  5. Go on Date Nights
  6. Fight
  7. Plan Things
  8. Do Nice Things
  9. Laugh
  10. Grow Together

Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.
